images.name: Miami Heat vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights
images.caption: Miami Heat vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

articles.description: — Pascal Siakam scored 30 points and Micah Potter added 21 and tied a career high with five 3-pointers to help the Indiana Pacers get past the Miami Heat for a rare...
articles.headline: Pascal Siakam scores 30 points to give Pacers 135-118 victory that adds to Heat's struggles

articles.description: New York Knicks guard Miles McBride was activated Sunday for the first time since undergoing hernia surgery in February.
articles.headline: Knick guard Miles McBride returns from core injury vs. OKC

images.name: Gary Trent Jr. sinks an and-1 trey for Bucks

articles.description: — Bennedict Mathurin scored 28 points, John Collins 22 and Kawhi Leonard 20 as the Los Angeles Clippers got past the short-handed Milwaukee Bucks 127-113 on Sunday for their fifth consecutive win.
articles.headline: Mathurin scores 28 to pace Clippers past short-handed Bucks 127-113

articles.description: Blue Jays manager John Schneider received a handwritten letter from NBA coach Steve Kerr about how to deal with his World Series Game 7 heartbreak.
articles.headline: Blue Jays' John Schneider gets reassurance from Steve Kerr
